protein_name: Inhibitory regulator of the Ras-cyclic AMP pathway. Binds inositol tetrakisphosphate (IP4) with high affinity. Might be a specific IP4 receptor. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasmic side of plasma membrane; cytosol; plasma membrane
raw_fields.Molecular Function: calcium channel regulator activity; GTPase activator activity; metal ion binding; zinc ion binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: intracellular signal transduction; negative regulation of Ras protein signal transduction; platelet activation; regulation of intracellular signal transduction; response to stress; signal transduction
